note: All DSK analysis was read-only against local copied disk images. Most ACS game data appears to use custom/raw disk storage rather than normal DOS catalog files.

diskImages.evidence: Byte-identical to Adventure Construction Set - Program Disk -Front.DSK and older ACS-Rivers Of Light.dsk; no RIVERS/RIVER/LIGHT title strings found.
Contains LAND OF AVENTURIA title strings and hidden-region tutorial text.

diskImages.file: Adventure Construction Set - Data Disk- Front.DSK
diskImages.evidence: Contains the same visible Land of Aventuria title/tutorial strings as the standalone Land image, but the whole image hash differs.
Contains pomegranate-seeds game message plus disk signature/copy-management strings.
Contains DOS/system strings and horse/door game message.
Contains Adventure Construction Set boot/program strings and BLADE BOOT strings.
